subcodes.title: Li-Hadrati’l-Haram
subcodes.first_line: O my sweet spirit! May God, the Most High, protect thee. Think not that the interruption of letters stems from [3.5s]... …God is my witness that since the time of our separation, such griefs encircled me as are beyond description
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله تعالی. جان شیرین من حرسک الله تعالی لا تحسبن انقطاع الکتب من ملل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @business; financial; property matters
